content.text:
```mdl
@ Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement governing inspection of stockholder list
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_14_nda_2

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# The two parties to the agreement
type Party = {
    name: string,
    is_company: bool          # true = Company, false = Stockholder
}

# The material that the Stockholder may inspect
type ConfidentialMaterial = {
    is_technical: bool        # hypothesis: only technical information
    is_confidential: bool
}

# The way the Stockholder intends to use the material
type Usage = {
    related_to_stockholder_interests: bool   # true if purpose is reasonably related
}

# A request for disclosure that may arise from legal process
type DisclosureRequest = {
    is_by_law: bool
    received: bool
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
entity company: Party
entity stockholder: Party
entity confidential_material: ConfidentialMaterial
entity usage: Usage
entity disclosure_request: DisclosureRequest

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Functions (pure helpers)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
func is_allowed_use(u: Usage) -> bool:
    u.related_to_stockholder_interests

func notice_due(r: DisclosureRequest) -> bool:
    r.is_by_law and r.received

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – obligations (O), prohibitions (F) and permissions (P)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Stockholder may use Confidential Material only for purposes reasonably
#    related to Stockholder’s interests.
rule O use_confidential_material_only_for_allowed_purposes:
    is_allowed_use(usage) always

# 2. Stockholder must not disclose, publish or communicate Confidential Material
#    to any person or entity, except as permitted by law.
rule F disclose_confidential_material:
    not (confidential_material.is_confidential) always

# 3. If a legal disclosure request is received, Stockholder must give the
#    Company prompt notice (within 2 business days) before any disclosure.
rule O give_prompt_notice_to_company_when_required:
    notice_due(disclosure_request) implies true always   # the “true” is a placeholder for the act of giving notice

# 4. Each Party submits to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Delaware Court of
#    Chancery.
rule O accept_delaware_chancery_jurisdiction:
    true always

# 5. The Agreement may be amended only by a written instrument signed by the
#    Party against whom enforcement is sought.
rule F amend_without_written_agreement:
    not (confidential_material.is_confidential) always   # placeholder – actual amendment logic would be modeled elsewhere

# 6. The Agreement is binding upon the Parties and their successors, assigns,
#    heirs, etc.
rule O agreement_is_binding_on_successors:
    true always

# 7. The Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.
rule O governed_by_delaware_law:
    true always

# 8. Hypothesis – Confidential Material shall only include technical information.
rule O confidential_material_is_technical:
    confidential_material.is_technical always
```
